title: Caiophora rosulata
taxonomy: Caiophora rosulata is classified within the family Polemoniaceae. This family is a group of flowering plants commonly known as the "gloxinia" or "prince's plague" family. Caiophora rosulata is further classified within the genus Caiophora, which is a group of flowering plants native to South America. The species is native to the Andes mountain range in Peru. Caiophora rosulata is a perennial plant that grows in rocky and mountainous regions.
